sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ التَّعَامُلُ مَعَ الْأَدْوِيَةِ حَذَرًا شَدِيدًا وَالْتِزَامًا صَارِمًا بِتَعْلِيمَاتِ الصَّيْدَلِيِّ وَالطَّبِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Rukovanje lijekovima zahtijeva izuzetan oprez i strogo pridržavanje uputa farmaceuta i ljekara.
sentences.translationEn: Dealing with medications requires extreme caution and strict adherence to the instructions of the pharmacist and doctor.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ قِرَاءَةُ النَّشْرَةِ الدَّاخِلِيَّةِ لِكُلِّ دَوَاءٍ لِمَعْرِفَةِ الْآثَارِ الْجَانِبِيَّةِ الْمُحْتَمَلَةِ وَالْجُرْعَةِ الْمُنَاسِبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je pročitati unutrašnje uputstvo za svaki lijek kako bi se saznalo o mogućim nuspojavama i odgovarajućoj dozi.
sentences.translationEn: It is essential to read the internal leaflet for each drug to know the possible side effects and the appropriate dosage.

sentences.arabic: يَنْبَغِي تَخْزِينُ الْأَدْوِيَةِ فِي مَكَانٍ بَارِدٍ وَجَافٍّ بَعِيدًا عَنْ مُتَنَاوَلِ الْأَطْفَالِ لِضَمَانِ سَلَامَتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Lijekove treba čuvati na hladnom i suhom mjestu van dohvata djece kako bi se osigurala njihova sigurnost.
sentences.translationEn: Medications should be stored in a cool, dry place out of reach of children to ensure their safety.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَجُوزُ التَّوَقُّفُ عَنْ تَنَاوُلِ الْمُضَادَّاتِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ الْمَوْصُوفَةِ فَجْأَةً دُونَ اسْتِشَارَةِ الْمُخْتَصِّ.
sentences.translation: Nije dozvoljeno naglo prestati s uzimanjem propisanih antibiotika bez konsultacije sa stručnjakom.
sentences.translationEn: It is not permissible to stop taking prescribed antibiotics suddenly without consulting a specialist.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْوَعْيَ بِكَيْفِيَّةِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الدَّوَاءِ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ هُوَ جُزْءٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ مِنْ عَمَلِيَّةِ الشِّفَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Svijest o tome kako pravilno koristiti lijek osnovni je dio procesa izlječenja.
sentences.translationEn: Awareness of how to use medicine correctly is an essential part of the healing process.
